name: Retro Rex
author: Poki
description: Retro Rex is an action platform game where you take the role of an angry dinosaur, unleashed on an unsuspecting tropical island. Crush all the buildings and eat anybody you can catch as you start at the local carnival, destroy the nearby city, smash a military base and jump inside the active volcano! What's more, there are many trophies and skins for you to obtain in order to truly master this game. Can you survive this retro dinosaur rampage? How do I play Retro Rex? Use the mouse to click on the menu buttons. Move: Left and Right arrow key, or A and S Jump: W, Up Arrow Key, or Spacebar Bite: Z Eat: X Roar: C Flame Breath Power-up: V (when unlocked) Who created Retro Rex? Retro Rex is created by Monoinyo. Play their other game on Poki: Jigsaw Gems ! How can I play Retro Rex for free? You can play Retro Rex for free on Poki. Can I play Retro Rex on mobile devices and desktop? Retro Rex can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
